_publications._publicationTitle: A High-Throughput Screening Platform Identifies Novel Combination Treatments for Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: MK-1775 with Doxorubicin did not show synergism in the HFF cell line
details: MK-1775 with Doxorubicin did not show synergism, indicating selectivity for tumor cells
